content:
Are you sure you want to reset the current state of the blank to its default state?
 You will not be able to undo this action.

comment.text: This text appears within a dialog box to confirm a user's intent to reset a blank template to its default settings. It warns the user that this action is irreversible. The description is used to inform the user about the consequences of resetting the template.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The verb 'спрете' (stop/halt) is used instead of 'възстановите' (reset/restore). In Bulgarian, 'спрете състоянието' does not mean 'reset the state'; it sounds like 'stop the state', which is semantically incorrect in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Уверени ли сте, че искате да възстановите текущото състояние на бланката до неговото изходно състояние?
Няма да можете да откатите това действие.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'blank' in the context of ONLYOFFICE refers to a 'blank template' (šablona), but the translation 'prázdného místa' means 'empty space/place', which is semantically incorrect for a template reset action.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jste si jisti, že chcete resetovat aktuální stav šablony na její výchozí stav? Tato akce nebude možné zrušit.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The term 'blank' in the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace refers to a 'blank template' or 'empty document', but the German translation uses 'Platzhalter', which means 'placeholder'. This changes the meaning from resetting a document/template to resetting a placeholder.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sind Sie sicher, dass Sie den aktuellen Zustand der leeren Vorlage auf ihren Standardzustand zurücksetzen möchten? Sie können diese Aktion nicht rückgängig machen.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence of the translation is in English instead of Spanish.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ¿Está seguro de que desea restablecer el estado actual del espacio en blanco a su estado predeterminado? No podrá deshacer esta acción.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation 'tyhjän kentän' (empty field) is used instead of 'blank' (referring to a blank template/canvas). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'blank' refers to the document/template itself, not a form field.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Oletko varma, että haluat nollata tyhjän sivun nykyisen tilan sen oletustilaan? Et voi peruuttaa tätä toimintoa.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'blank' in the context of a template refers to the template itself, but the French translation uses 'champ' (field), which changes the meaning from resetting a whole template to resetting a single input field.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Êtes-vous sûr de vouloir réinitialiser l'état actuel du modèle à son état par défaut ?
 Vous ne pourrez pas annuler cette action.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The second sentence contains English words ('Bu action-ը հետ անել հնարավոր չի լինի') instead of being fully translated into Armenian.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Հաստատու՞մ եք, որ ցանկանում եք «blank»-ի ներկայիս վիճակը վերականգնել դրա լռակային վիճակին։ Այս գործողությունը հնարավոր չի լինի չեղարկել։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'blank' in the context of a template refers to a 'modello' or 'foglio vuoto', but the translation uses 'blocco' (block), which changes the meaning of the object being reset.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
È sicuro di voler reimpostare lo stato corrente del modello al suo stato predefinito?
Non sarà possibile annullare questa azione.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation is semantically incorrect and nonsensical. 'Vai esat droši, ka vēlaties atgriezties blāna pašreitējā stāvokļa par défaut stāvokli?' is grammatically broken and uses 'par défaut' (French/untranslated). 'Lai šo darbību atgriezt no acīm' is a literal, incorrect translation of 'undo' that translates to 'to return this action from eyes', which makes no sense in Latvian.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Vai esat pārliecināti, ka vēlaties atiestatīt pašreizējo šablonu uz sākotnējā stāvokļa? Šo darbību nevarēs atcelt.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'blank' in the context of a template refers to the template itself, but 'bloco' in Portuguese means 'block'. This changes the object being reset.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Tem certeza de que deseja redefinir o estado atual do modelo em seu estado padrão?
Você não poderá desfazer esta ação.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'blank' in the context of ONLYOFFICE refers to a 'blank document' or 'template' (espaço em branco/modelo), but the translation uses 'bloco' (block), which changes the technical meaning of the object being reset.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Tem certeza de que deseja redefinir o estado atual do modelo para o seu estado padrão? Você não poderá desfazer esta ação.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'blank' in the context of a template refers to a 'blank document' or 'template', but the translation uses 'câmpului gol' which means 'empty field'. This changes the meaning from resetting a template to resetting an empty input field.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Sunteți sigur că doriți să resetați starea curentă a șablonului la starea sa implicită?
Nu veți putea anula această acțiune.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The first sentence is grammatically broken and nonsensical in Slovak ('Ste, že chcete...'). It appears to be a mistranslation of 'Are you sure' (which should be 'Ste si istý/á' or 'Chcete...') and uses 'zvrátit' which is an incorrect/archaic term for 'reset' in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
Ste si istí, že chcete obnoviť aktuálny stav šablóny do jej predvoleného stavu?
Túto akciu nebudete môcť zrušiť.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'rikuperoni' means 'to recover/restore' (as in recovering lost data), whereas the English 'reset' in this context means to return to a default state. Additionally, the second sentence 'Nuk do të mund ta anulohet ky veprim' is grammatically incorrect in Albanian (it translates roughly to 'It will not be able to be be cancelled this action').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Jeni të sigurt se dëshironi të ktheni gjendjen aktuale të boshit në gjendjen e saj parazgjedhur? Nuk do të mund ta anuloni këtë veprim.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'замовного' (ordered/custom) is used instead of 'початкового' or 'стандартного' (default). In this context, 'замовний стан' implies a state that was ordered or customized, which is the opposite of the intended 'default state'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ви впевнені, що хочете скинути поточний стан документа до його початкового стану? Ви не зможете скасувати цю дію.
